case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MARIE SALAZAR ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIE ORTEGA, JOSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 ELLIS STREET, #2D SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIE ORTEGA, JOSE
AMENDED DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE / $8.76 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
